title: valeranda fruticosa
intro: Valeranda fruticosa, also known as Valerian, is a perennial flowering plant that belongs to the Valerianaceae family. It has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include sedative, anxiolytic, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Valerian root include improved sleep quality, reduced stress and anxiety, and relief from muscle and joint pain. Valerian root can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, capsules, and dried roots, which can be consumed to promote relaxation and well-being.
